name: MCP Builder
description: Comprehensive guide and tooling for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to integrate external APIs and services with Claude. Includes reference documentation on best practices, Node.js and Python server patterns, and evaluation scripts to test and improve MCP server quality. Designed to help developers build well-structured, production-ready MCP integrations.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md, reference docs (best practices, node/python MCP server guides, evaluation), Python evaluation scripts, and Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt. Verified present at skills/mcp-builder/ in the repo tree.
